title: Jil Jil Jinnie - AMNESIA
desc: Himbida loses his memory after a magical blow from Motapippi. Mayan tries hard to help but fails. Later, while trying to catch Munna and Meenu, a chaotic fight breaks out with Jil Jil.

title: Jil Jil Jinnie - MAGICIAN MITTU
desc: The children demand magic from Mittu. Mittu asks for Jil Jil's belt to be used as a prop to show his magic. Jil Jil refuses. But when provoked by the children he gives away his belt to Mittu.

title: Jil Jil Jinnie - DEFYING GRAVITY
desc: With his magical powers Himbida invents a string that can defy gravity. Just tie it upon something and it will be weightless.An episode stuffed with lot of comical scenes.

title: Jay Jagannath - Lanka Yatra
desc: Balram learns the Sundarkand with Jagan's help on a Lanka tour. Accused of theft, Jagan saves him.

title: Mister Maker - Junk Picture
desc: Mister Maker makes a fantastic junk picture, paints with cardboard, and turns an egg box into tasty-looking beans on toast. Solve today's shape puzzle and watch kids build a gigantic rocket.

title: Mister Maker - Stone Footprint
desc: Mister Maker crafts a stone footprint, paints a bright firework picture and fits a ship into a jar of blue rice. Solve the shape puzzle and watch the Mini Makers create a giant, delightful snail.

desc: Wapiti gets blown away so Darwin and Newt's use the power of wind to rescue their friend. Will they be able to succeed?

desc: In this series, Darwin and Newts use the zipline to take Heni to see an incredible giant snail, a malfunction is overcome thanks to their newfound knowledge of magnets.
